findings.summary: Ship step 4.7 calls write_changeset('.changesets', ...) with a str; _changeset.py calls changesets_dir.mkdir() -> AttributeError. Producer never writes a changeset; dev accumulates none.
findings.suggested_fix: Coerce str|Path at entry of write_changeset + read_changesets (with test), and/or fix the snippet to Path('.changesets') + import. Correct the WP-002 spec example too.

findings.summary: Loop-guard expression uses double-quoted string literal inside ${{ }}; GitHub Actions rejects at expression evaluation (YAML lint passes). Guard may not protect against the bot's own push re-triggering the workflow.
findings.suggested_fix: Single-quote the literal: ${{ !startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, 'release: sulis') }}. Verify with actionlint.
